title: 宝塚記念の後に・Can't C Me

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Both the spectators and the other runners praised
my performance.
...But this isn't what I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
I have finally realized my true goal: I want to
become a true force of nature. I suspect many of
the greats in this generation will be at my next
goal race, the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
I will crush them all and claim this era as my own.
*/
